name: Espresso Granita
recipeIngredient: 1 pound espresso coffee, freshly and finely ground
1 cup superfine sugar up to 1-1/2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the coffee in a Melior-type coffee pot with half of the boiling water and brew for 10 minutes. Push down the plunger to make the coffee.
2. Repeat with the remaining coffee and water, ensuring the final brew is very strong.
3. Mix in sugar until the coffee tastes slightly sweet.
4. Freeze the mixture in an ice cream churn according to the manufacturer's directions until it becomes firm and grainy.
5. Serve granita in champagne glasses with a swirl of unsweetened whipped cream.
